name: Human embryonic stem cell-derived retinal pigment epithelium in patients with age-related macular degeneration and Stargardt's macular dystrophy: follow-up of two open-label phase 1/2 studies
summary: Follow-up from two open-label phase 1/2 studies of subretinal hESC-derived retinal pigment epithelium transplantation in atrophic age-related macular degeneration and Stargardt macular dystrophy.
